name: leader-line
when_to_use: 需要在两个既有 DOM 元素之间画会随布局定位的箭头或连线时用它,而非手写 SVG path——原生在跨容器坐标换算、端点吸附和重排后重定位上容易失败;非做可编辑节点图或自动布局。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画固定坐标 SVG,做不到任意 DOM 端点吸附、曲线路径和布局变化后的可靠重定位;leader-line 直接吃两个 HTMLElement 并管理覆盖层。

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-writing an SVG path when you need an arrow or line between two existing DOM elements that follows layout, because native implementations easily fail at cross-container coordinate conversion, endpoint attachment, and repositioning after reflow; not for editable node graphs or automatic layout.
en.why_valuable: AI can normally only draw fixed-coordinate SVG; it cannot reliably attach curved paths to arbitrary DOM endpoints and reposition them after layout changes. leader-line directly consumes two HTMLElement values and manages the overlay.

data_in.note: start/end are real HTMLElement values already in the same document, not CSS selectors; options includes only common upstream fields, and every optional field states its default.

options?._default: {} -- use the entire default LeaderLine appearance

spec.note: The line has no container height of its own, but the endpoint layout area must have an explicit pixel height; the default example area is 320px, and rule 3 forbids vh or percentage heights. After an endpoint moves or its container reflows, the consuming AI must call line.position().

data_in.note: start/end 是已经进入同一 document 的真实 HTMLElement,不是 CSS selector;options 仅裁剪上游高频字段,每个可选字段均注明默认。

options?._default: {} —— 全部采用 LeaderLine 默认外观
options?.startPlug?: string —— 上游 plug 名,默认 'behind'
options?.endPlug?: string —— 上游 plug 名,默认 'arrow1'

spec.note: 连线没有自有容器高,但端点布局区必须有显式像素高度;默认示意区 320px,铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。端点移动或容器重排后由消费 AI 调 line.position()。

boot.widget: unsupported:上游把 SVG overlay 挂到 document 级而非给定 ShadowRoot,无法满足 widget 所有视觉 DOM 落 shadow 容器的铁律。

carriers.widget: unsupported:document 级 SVG overlay 不能收进 ShadowRoot
carriers.codex: supported:DOM + SVG overlay;端点必须在同一 sandbox document

isolation.evidence: leader-line.min.js 把 SVG overlay 追加到 document.body(document.body x5、.body.appendChild x3、insertBefore);绑 window `addEventListener("resize")` 及 mouseenter/leave/out/over;无 head 样式注入(未见 createElement('style')/head.appendChild)。overlay 以绝对 document 坐标定位、逃逸到 body,无法收进 shadowRoot;boot 未在 teardown 调 line.remove() → resize 监听与 body SVG 会泄漏 → widget 不成立。

minimal.start: <HTMLElement — a real element already in the document, e.g. document.getElementById('node-a'); cannot be expressed as JSON>
minimal.end: <HTMLElement — a real element already in the document, e.g. document.getElementById('node-b'); cannot be expressed as JSON>
